'''fadulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumonic|pneumonic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumonic|pneumonic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fadulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fædilith|fædilith]] || [[word:fædilij|fædilij]] || [[word:fædilish|fædilish]] || [[word:fædili|fædili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:faduduluth|faduduluth]] || [[word:faduduluj|faduduluj]] || [[word:fadudulush|fadudulush]] || [[word:fadudulu|fadudulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:faduluth|faduluth]] || [[word:faduluj|faduluj]] || [[word:fadulush|fadulush]] || [[word:fadulu|fadulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fadufluth|fadufluth]] || [[word:fadufluj|fadufluj]] || [[word:faduflush|faduflush]] || [[word:fadufluf|fadufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:faduluthu|faduluthu]] || [[word:faduluju|faduluju]] || [[word:fadulushu|fadulushu]] || [[word:faduluku|faduluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:faduluth|faduluth]] || [[word:faduluj|faduluj]] || [[word:fadulush|fadulush]] || [[word:fadulu|fadulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:faduluthul|faduluthul]] || [[word:fadulujul|fadulujul]] || [[word:fadulushul|fadulushul]] || [[word:fadulukul|fadulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:faduluthuthu|faduluthuthu]] || [[word:fadulujuju|fadulujuju]] || [[word:fadulushushu|fadulushushu]] || [[word:faduluku|faduluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:faduluthun|faduluthun]] || [[word:fadulujun|fadulujun]] || [[word:fadulushun|fadulushun]] || [[word:fadulukun|fadulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:faduluthuoro|faduluthuoro]] || [[word:fadulujuoro|fadulujuoro]] || [[word:fadulushuoro|fadulushuoro]] || [[word:fadulukuoro|fadulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
